raw_consumer_statement: Someone compromised my Best Buy account and changed my password address and phone number Best Buy notified me by email. A {$900.00} drone was purchased and send to their address. Best Buy did a investigation and send me the tracking address where the item was delivered to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Tx. XXXX. My address XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I don't know anybody in Texas. I have the documents uploaded. After the investigation, they said that they delivered the item to me. and I was responsible for paying for an item I never received
